Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Fool{f 0 1 27}: EXP acquired from battles will increase until you leave Tartarus.[n]{f 0 1 2}Magician{f 0 1 27}: Acquire rare items.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}High Priestess{f 0 1 27}: All-Out Attack damage will increase until you leave Tartarus for the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Empress{f 0 1 27}: The Endurance, Agility, and Luck of Personas in your possession will increase by 2.[n]{f 0 1 2}Emperor{f 0 1 27}: The Strength and Magic of Personas in your possession will increase by 2.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Hierophant{f 0 1 27}: The level of your currently equipped Persona will increase by 1.[n]{f 0 1 2}Lovers{f 0 1 27}: Social Link bonuses for Persona fusions will increase until you leave Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Chariot{f 0 1 27}: Your maximum HP will increase by 10.[n]{f 0 1 2}Justice{f 0 1 27}: You will be able to pick one additional card from Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Hermit{f 0 1 27}: Your maximum SP will increase by 7.[n]{f 1 1}
